Real-time validation endpoint for processor settlement form.
      
      **Without params**: Returns all processors with unsettled amounts
      **With params**: Validates settlement amount and returns validation results

      - Validate settlement amount as user fills the form
      - Show real-time errors/warnings before submission

get.description:
Real-time validation endpoint for direct fee collection form.
      
      **Without params**: Returns all processors with unsettled fee amounts
      **With params**: Validates fee amount and returns validation results
      
      Use this endpoint to:
      - Load initial form data (all processors with unsettled fees)
      - Validate fee amount as user fills the form
      - Show real-time errors/warnings before submission
      
      CRITICAL: In DIRECT settlement, the processor is the debtor (not the merchant).
      Processors send bulk wire transfers for accumulated fees.

parameters.name: liveMode
parameters.description: Live mode (true for live database, false for test database)

parameters.description: Only validate entries created before this date (ISO 8601). Useful for period-based settlements (e.g., 'January fees').

post.description:
Creates a new payment link - a shareable link that merchants can send to customers.
      
      Features:
      - Supports multiple line items with adjustable quantities
      - Custom fields for collecting additional customer information
      - After completion settings (redirect or hosted confirmation)
      - Automatic amount calculation from line items
      - Validates currency consistency across line items
      
      Works with both JWT (dashboard) and API keys (integrations).

get.description:
Lists payment links with advanced filtering, pagination, and search.
      
      Features:
      - Filter by active status
      - Search by product name, description, or unitLabel
      - Filter by amount (equal, between, greater, less)
      - Filter by date (last period, equal, between, after, before)
      - Pagination support
      
      Works with both JWT (dashboard) and API keys (integrations).

parameters.description: Merchant ID (required for JWT auth, optional for API key auth - comes from API key)
parameters.name: merchantId

parameters.description: Search by product name, description, or unitLabel in line items (supports comma-separated terms)

parameters.description: Amount filter condition (serialized string format: eq:100 or bt:10,100 or gt:50 or lt:200)
parameters.name: amount

patch.description:
Updates multiple payment links' active status in a single operation.
      Used for activating/deactivating multiple payment links at once.
      
      Actions:
      - activate: Sets active=true for all specified payment links
      - deactivate: Sets active=false for all specified payment links
      
      Works with both JWT (dashboard) and API keys (integrations).

get.description:
Retrieves a payment link with all related data including:
      - Line items with prices and products
      - Custom fields with dropdown options
      - After completion settings
      
      Works with both JWT (dashboard) and API keys (integrations).
get.summary: Get a payment link by ID

patch.description:
Partially updates an existing payment link. Only provided fields will be updated.
      
      Features:
      - Partial updates: Only send fields you want to update
      - Updates line items with adjustable quantities (if provided, replaces all existing line items)
      - Updates custom fields (if provided, replaces all existing custom fields)
      - Updates after completion settings (if provided, replaces existing settings)
      - Recalculates amount from line items when line items are updated
      - Validates currency consistency across line items when line items are updated
      
      Note: 
      - If lineItems is provided, all existing line items are replaced
      - If customFields is provided, all existing custom fields are replaced
      - If customFields is an empty array, all custom fields are removed
      - expiresAt can be set to null to remove expiration
      
      Works with both JWT (dashboard) and API keys (integrations).

Lists events for a merchant with optional filtering by:
- **eventId**: Filter by a specific event ID
- **resourceId**: Filter by resource ID (e.g., pi_xxx, ch_xxx)
- **includeRelated**: When true and resourceId is provided, also include events for related resources
- **type**: Filter by event type (supports partial match, e.g., "charge" matches "charge.succeeded")
- **date**: Date filter (e.g., last:7,days or between:2024-01-01,2024-12-31)

Pagination is supported via page and limit parameters.

parameters.name: fromDashboard
parameters.description: Filter by source: true = dashboard, false = API

parameters.description: Filter by success (true) or failure (false). false = status >= 400

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific API request log.
Returns aggregated analytics data for the developer overview dashboard, including API request and webhook delivery metrics.

parameters.name: liveMode
parameters.description: Filter by live or test mode

parameters.name: hours
parameters.description: Number of hours to look back (default: 168 = 1 week)

get.description:
Returns time series data for API requests with fixed bucket counts.

Time ranges and bucket counts:
- 4h: 48 buckets (5 min intervals)
- 12h: 48 buckets (15 min intervals)
- 24h: 48 buckets (30 min intervals)
- 7d: 42 buckets (4 hour intervals)

Each bucket contains:
- success: count of successful requests (status < 400)
- error: breakdown by "METHOD /path" -> error_type -> count
- timestamp: Unix timestamp in seconds

Always returns full time series with empty buckets filled in.

parameters.name: liveMode
parameters.description: Filter by live or test mode

get.description:
Returns time-bucketed webhook delivery analytics.

Each bucket is a tuple: [unix_timestamp, { endpoint_id: stats, ... }]

Stats per endpoint include:
- avg_duration, min_duration, max_duration (in seconds)
- result_type: { "SUCCESS": n, "FAILED": n, ... }
- error_type: { "timeout": n, "network_error": n }
- status: { "200": n, "500": n, ... }

Time ranges:
- 4h: 48 buckets (5-minute intervals)
- 12h: 48 buckets (15-minute intervals)
- 24h: 48 buckets (30-minute intervals)
- 7d: 42 buckets (4-hour intervals)

Always returns full time series (empty buckets included).

parameters.name: liveMode
parameters.description: Filter by live or test mode

get.description:
Returns events that completely failed to be delivered (all retry attempts exhausted),
grouped by event type. Shows the count of distinct events that failed and the most recent failure timestamp.

This is useful for identifying patterns in delivery failures by event type.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of groups to return (default: 50)

parameters.name: liveMode
parameters.description: Filter by live or test mode

parameters.name: hours
parameters.description: Number of hours to look back (default: 168 = 1 week)

200.description: Failed event deliveries grouped by event type

get.summary: Get failed event deliveries grouped by event type

post.description:
Creates a new payment intent - the core object for checkout flow.
      
      Payment Intent Lifecycle:
      1. Create payment intent with amount
      2. Attach payment method (or provide during creation)
      3. Confirm payment intent
      4. Create charge to process payment
      5. Payment succeeds → status: succeeded
      
      Use Cases:
      - Checkout flows
      - Subscription setup
      - One-time payments
      - Guest checkout
      
      Works with both JWT (dashboard) and API keys (integrations).

get.description:
Lists payment intents with advanced filtering, pagination, and aggregates.
      Used extensively by dashboard for transaction listing and reporting.
      
      Features:
      - Virtual status calculation (REFUNDED, PARTIALLY_REFUNDED, etc.)
      - Fee breakdown with VAT
      - Aggregate totals (captured, refunded, net amount)
      - Customer and payment method details
      - Refund and dispute counts
      - Advanced search and filtering

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Date filter condition (serialized string format: last:7,days or between:2024-01-01,2024-12-31)

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Amount filter condition (serialized string format: eq:100 or bt:10,100 or gt:50 or lt:200)

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by customer name, email, phone, payment intent ID, or description

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Array of payment intent statuses. Includes both real statuses (SUCCEEDED, PROCESSING, etc.) and virtual statuses (REFUNDED, PARTIALLY_REFUNDED, UNCAPTURED, FAILED)

Lists nested/related payment intents with filtering.

      - Pagination support
      - Virtual status calculation (REFUNDED, PARTIALLY_REFUNDED, etc.)

get.summary: List payment methods for a customer

post.description:
Creates a charge using a previously saved payment method (tokenized).
      This is for recurring payments or saved cards.
      
      Features:
      - Smart processor routing
      - Dynamic fee calculation (On-Us, domestic, international)
      - BIN detection for fee optimization
      - Atomic ledger updates (double-entry bookkeeping)
      - Settlement model support (AGGREGATED vs DIRECT)
      
      Works with both JWT (dashboard) and API keys (integrations).

401.description: Unauthorized

404.description: Payment intent, payment method, or customer not found

post.summary: Create a charge with saved payment method

get.description: Lists charges with optional filters for customer, payment intent, pagination.
Retrieves a charge with all details including fee breakdown and ledger info.

post.description:
Creates a full or partial refund for a successful charge.
      
      Features:
      - Full or partial refunds
      - Ledger reversal (double-entry bookkeeping)
      - Balance updates (debits available funds)
      - Updates charge.amountRefunded
      - Updates paymentIntent.amountRefunded
      
      Refunds:
      - Hit available balance immediately (no hold period)
      - Create negative balance transactions
      - Reverse the original charge's ledger entries
      - Platform keeps fees (business decision)
      
      Works with both JWT (dashboard) and API keys (integrations).

401.description: Unauthorized

get.description: Lists refunds with optional filters for charge and pagination.
Retrieves a refund with all details including ledger info.

info.title: XPay API
info.description: API documentation for the XPay payment platform

tags.name: Payout Methods
tags.description: Handles payout method management for merchants. Dashboard-only operation. Requires JWT authentication (rejects API keys). Requires OWNER or ADMIN role.

access-token.description: JWT token for dashboard users. Format: Bearer <token>

api-key.name: Authorization
api-key.description: API key for merchant integrations. Can be sent as 'Bearer <key>' or just '<key>'. Prefixes: pk_test_, sk_test_, rk_test_, pk_live_, sk_live_, rk_live_

phoneNumber.description: The phoneNumber to reset password for

token.description: Password reset token sent to user

phoneNumber.description: The phone number of the user

firstName.description: The first name of the user

lastName.description: The last name of the user

email.description: The email address of the user

password.description: User password (must contain uppercase, lowercase, and number)

currentPassword.description: The current password of the user

newPassword.description: New password (must contain uppercase, lowercase, and number)

amount.description: Price amount in smallest currency unit

amountSubtotal.description: Total before any discounts or taxes (unitAmount × quantity)

amountDiscount.description: Discount amount applied to this item

amountTax.description: Tax amount applied to this item

image.description: External image URL (will be fetched and uploaded to Cloudflare)

unitAmount.description: Unit amount in smallest currency unit (required)

productData.description: Inline product data (required - at least name)

price.description: Existing price ID (mutually exclusive with priceData)

priceData.description: Inline price data (mutually exclusive with price)

billingDetails.description: Billing details including cardholder name and address

address.description: Whether to save billing address to customer.address. Defaults to 'never'.

name.description: Whether to save name to customer.name. Defaults to 'never'.

shipping.description: Whether to save shipping info to customer.shipping. Defaults to 'never'.

feesPassThrough.description: Whether customer pays platform fee instead of merchant. When true, platform fee is added to customer payment.

vatCollectionEnabled.description: Whether to collect merchant's product VAT from customer. When enabled, VAT is added to customer payment.

vatCollectionRate.description: VAT collection rate in basis points (e.g., 1400 = 14%). Required when vatCollectionEnabled is true.

brand.description: Brand color for backgrounds like order summary

brandForeground.description: Brand foreground for text on brand backgrounds

borderStyle.description: Border style for inputs, buttons, cards

radius.description: Border radius override (in rem, 0-4). Overrides borderStyle default.

successUrl.description: URL to redirect after successful payment

mode.description: Session mode: payment, subscription, or setup

cancelUrl.description: URL to redirect if customer cancels

customerId.description:
Existing customer ID. If provided, customer data will be used to prefill checkout fields.

    IMPORTANT: Cannot be used together with customerDetails - you must choose one:
    - Use customerId to checkout with an existing customer
    - Use customerDetails to provide prefill data for a new customer

customerDetails.description:
Customer details for prefill and collection. Used to:
    - Prefill checkout form fields
    - Create a new customer (if customerCreation is 'always')

    IMPORTANT: Cannot be used together with customerId - you must choose one.

customerUpdate.description:
Controls which customer fields to update when customerId is provided.

    IMPORTANT: Only valid when customerId is provided. Will be ignored otherwise.

    Each field can be 'auto' (update customer) or 'never' (don't update, default).

feeConfig.description:
Fee configuration override for this session.
    If not provided, merchant's default fee config will be used.

    - feesPassThrough: Customer pays platform fee instead of merchant
    - vatCollectionEnabled: Collect merchant's product VAT from customer
    - vatCollectionRate: VAT rate in basis points (e.g., 1400 = 14%)

brandingSettings.description:
UI customization settings for the checkout page.
    Allows customization of colors, spacing, border styles, input styles, etc.

paymentMethodTypes.description:
Restrict allowed payment method types for this session.
    If not provided, all enabled payment methods for the merchant will be available.

    Example: ["card_acquirer", "mobile_wallet"]

amountPlatformFee.description: Platform fee amount (only when feesPassThrough is enabled)

amountCollectedVat.description: Collected VAT amount (only when vatCollectionEnabled is enabled)

amount.description: Amount in customer's currency (smallest unit)

exchangeRateId.description: Reference to ExchangeRate record for audits

billingDetails.description: Billing details including cardholder name and address

feesPassThrough.description: Whether customer pays platform fee (false = merchant pays)

vatCollectionEnabled.description: Whether to collect VAT from customer

vatCollectionRate.description: VAT collection rate in basis points (e.g., 1400 = 14%)

brand.description: Brand color for backgrounds like order summary

brandForeground.description: Brand foreground for text on brand backgrounds

borderStyle.description: Border style for inputs, buttons, cards

displayName.description: Display name for the payment method

estimatedFee.description: Estimated fee amount (when feesPassThrough is enabled)

isOnUs.description: Whether this is an on-us transaction (same bank)

isInternational.description: Whether this is an international card

feeAmount.description: Platform fee amount (only if feesPassThrough is true)

vatAmount.description: VAT amount (only if vatCollectionEnabled is true)

cardInfo.description: Card info (only for card payments with BIN)

address.description: Whether to save address to customer.address

name.description: Whether to save name to customer.name

shipping.description: Whether to save shipping to customer.shipping

presentmentDetails.description: Presentment details for multi-currency. Shows what customer sees when paying in a currency different from settlement (EGP). Null when no conversion.

customer.description: Customer object (when customerId is provided). Contains existing customer data for prefill.

customerDetails.description: CustomerDetails - unified prefill/collection object. Contains name, email, phone, address (billing), shipping.

lineItems.description: Line items with full price and product details

customFields.description: Custom fields with configuration and collected values (Stripe-aligned). Values are populated after customer submits.

feeConfig.description: Fee configuration (tells checkout whether to track BIN and display fees)

brandingSettings.description: UI customization settings for checkout (colors, spacing, borders, etc.)

paymentMethodTypes.description: Available payment method types with fee estimates

fees.description: Fee breakdown (only populated when feesPassThrough or vatCollectionEnabled, and after /update with BIN for cards)

customerUpdate.description: Controls which customer fields to update when customerId is provided

paymentLinkId.description: Payment Link ID (if created from link)

livemode.description: Whether this is a live mode session

name.description: Customer name (full name from contact details)

billingDetails.description: Billing details including cardholder name and billing address

customerDetails.description: Customer details - unified structure containing name, email, phone, billingDetails, and shipping

customFields.description: Custom field values collected from the customer (Stripe-aligned). Values are merged into the customFields array.

index.description: Index of the line item in lineItemsData array

quantity.description: New quantity for this line item

bin.description: BIN (first 6-8 digits of card number) for fee calculation. When provided, triggers card fee calculation based on card type (local/international, on-us/off-us).

last4.description: Last 4 digits of the card number. Required in test mode to identify the specific test card for accurate fee calculation.

expiresAt.description: When this rate expires (null for current rates)

rates.description: Array of exchange rates to set

requestedActivation.description: Whether the merchant has requested activation

payoutMethods.description: Payout methods (if requested, currently not implemented)

legalName.description: Legal name of the business (as registered)

displayName.description: Display name of the business (shown to customers)

city.description: City where the business is located

country.description: Country where the business is located (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code)

description.example: We provide innovative solutions for modern businesses.

name.description: Name must consist of first name and last name

transactions.description: Number of transactions (payment intents) for this customer

invoices.description: Number of invoices for this customer

subscriptions.description: Number of subscriptions for this customer

relatedGuestPayments.description: Number of guest payment transactions (same email/phone but different customer ID) for this merchant

fingerprint.description: Card fingerprint for identifying the same card across customers

paymentMethods.description: Payment methods associated with this customer

amountDisputeLosses.description: Total amount lost to disputes (in smallest currency unit)

amountRefunded.description: Total amount refunded to customer (in smallest currency unit)

firstPurchaseAt.description: Date of first purchase (ISO 8601 date string, empty string if none)

grossSpend.description: Total amount charged (before refunds, in smallest currency unit)

lastPurchaseAt.description: Date of most recent purchase (ISO 8601 date string, empty string if none)

totalCount.description: Total count of matching records (for pagination)

startTime.description: Start time of the period (start of month)

endTime.description: End time of the period (end of month)

total.description: Total amount spent in this period (in smallest currency unit)

refunded.description: Total amount refunded in this period (in smallest currency unit)

transactions.description: Total number of transactions in this period

totalSpent.description: Total amount spent across all periods (in smallest currency unit)

totalRefunded.description: Total amount refunded across all periods (in smallest currency unit)

timeSeries.description: Time series data grouped by month

clientSecret.description: The client secret (pi_xxx_secret_yyy or cs_xxx_secret_yyy format)

bin.description: First 6-8 digits of card number (NOT sensitive)

saveCard.description: Whether the customer wants to save the card

fingerprint.description: Card fingerprint for fraud detection (deterministic hash)

issuerName.description: Full issuer name (from external BIN API)

paymentIntentId.description: Payment Intent ID - use as MPGS orderId

chargeId.description: Pre-created Charge ID - use as MPGS transactionId for PAY

amount.description: Amount to charge in smallest currency unit

isMarketplace.description: Whether this is a marketplace/aggregator transaction

liveMode.description: Whether this is a live mode transaction (use live MPGS credentials)

billingDetails.description: Billing details collected from checkout (for cardholder name)

vaultTokenId.description: Vault token ID for fraud tracking

amount.description: Amount in smallest currency unit

isForeign.description: Whether this is a foreign currency transaction

isMarketplace.description: Whether this is a marketplace/aggregator transaction

id.description: Balance transaction ID that encountered an error

failed.description: Number of transactions that failed to settle

nextSettlementDate.description: Next settlement date (earliest availableOn for pending transactions)

amount.description: Transaction amount (in smallest currency unit)

net.description: Net amount after fees (in smallest currency unit)

sourceId.description: Source ID (charge ID, refund ID, etc.)

amount.description: Charge amount in smallest currency unit
Refund amount in smallest currency unit
Payout amount in smallest currency unit
Topup amount in smallest currency unit
Dispute amount in smallest currency unit
Gross amount (positive for money in, negative for money out) in smallest currency unit

availableOn.description: Timestamp when funds become available in balance (Unix timestamp)

fee.description: Total fees in smallest currency unit

net.description: Net amount after fees in smallest currency unit

source.description: Source object (charge, refund, payout, topup, or dispute)

totalCount.description: Total count of matching records (for pagination)

settlementAmount.description: Settlement amount received (in smallest currency unit)

createdBefore.description: Only settle entries created before this date (for period-based settlements). Example: If processor sends wire for 'January settlement', set this to end of January to exclude February entries.

amount.description: Settlement amount

processors.description: List of processors with unsettled amounts (when no params provided)

validation.description: Validation result for specific processor (when params provided)

processorId.description: Processor ID (the bank/processor that owes us fees)

feeAmount.description: Total fee amount collected (in smallest currency unit). This is a bulk settlement - processors send ONE wire transfer for all accumulated fees.

createdBefore.description: Only settle entries created before this date (for period-based settlements). Example: If processor sends wire for 'January fees', set this to end of January to exclude February entries.

processors.description: List of processors with unsettled fee amounts (when no params provided)

validation.description: Validation result for specific merchant (when params provided)

createdBefore.description: Only settle entries created before this date (for period-based payments). Example: If paying VAT for 'Q1', set this to end of Q1 to exclude Q2 entries.

currencies.description: List of currencies with VAT payable (when no params provided)

validation.description: Validation result for specific currency (when params provided)

lineItems.description: Line items for the payment link

savePaymentDetails.description: Whether to save payment details for future use

active.description: Whether the payment link is active

computedAmount.description: Computed total amount from line items

active.description: Whether the payment link is active

computedAmount.description: Computed total amount from line items

totalCount.description: Total count of matching records (for pagination)

paymentLinkIds.description: Array of payment link IDs to update

success.description: Whether the bulk update was successful

lineItems.description: Line items for the payment link (if provided, replaces all existing line items)

savePaymentDetails.description: Whether to save payment details for future use

afterCompletion.description: After completion settings (if provided, replaces existing settings)

customFields.description: Custom fields (max 3, if provided, replaces all existing custom fields)

expiresAt.description: Expiration date (set to null to remove expiration)

active.description: Whether the payment link is active

amount.description: Payout amount in smallest currency unit

arrivalDate.description: Expected arrival date in merchant's bank account

automatic.description: Whether this payout was created automatically by schedule

payoutSettlementType.description: Settlement type (STANDARD = we execute, EXTERNAL = bank executes)

statementDescriptor.description: Statement descriptor for merchant's bank statement

balanceTransactionId.description: Balance transaction ID created by this payout

failureBalanceTransactionId.description: Failure balance transaction ID if payout failed

originalPayoutId.description: Original payout ID if this is a reversal

amount.description: Payout amount in smallest currency unit

bank_account.description: Bank account details (if type is bank_account)

totalCount.description: Total count of matching records (for pagination)

weeklyAnchor.description: For weekly interval: which day of the week

monthlyAnchor.description: For monthly interval: which day of the month (1-31)

delayDays.description: Additional delay in days before creating payouts

autoRecordExternalPayouts.description: Auto-record external payouts for DIRECT settlement processors

settlementAverageDays.description: Average settlement days for DIRECT processors

weeklyAnchor.description: For weekly interval: which day of the week

monthlyAnchor.description: For monthly interval: which day of the month (1-31)

autoRecordExternalPayouts.description: Auto-record external payouts for DIRECT settlement processors

settlementAverageDays.description: Average settlement days for DIRECT processors

merchantId.description: Merchant ID that encountered an error

skipped.description: Number of merchants skipped (no balance or manual schedule)

amount.description: Amount that would be paid out (in smallest currency unit)

wouldBeCreated.description: Whether this payout would actually be created (due and has balance)

reason.description: Reason why payout would or wouldn't be created
reason.example: Payout is due and balance is available

nextRunDate.description: Next scheduled run date for this specific payout type

transactionCount.description: Number of balance transactions that would be included in this payout

standardAmount.description: Available balance for STANDARD payouts (AGGREGATED settlements)

externalAmount.description: Available balance for EXTERNAL payouts (DIRECT settlements)

payouts.description: Preview of payouts that would be created for this currency

nextPayoutDate.description: Next payout date based on schedule

totalPayoutsCount.description: Total number of payouts that would be created

merchants.description: List of merchants with payout preview data

totalPayoutsCount.description: Total number of payouts that would be created across all merchants

details.description: Type-specific details based on payout method type. For BANK_ACCOUNT: use AccountPayoutMethodDetailsDto. For CARD: use CardPayoutMethodDetailsDto. For WALLET: use WalletPayoutMethodDetailsDto.

isDefault.description: Is default payout method for the merchant

details.description: Type-specific details based on payout method type. For BANK_ACCOUNT: AccountPayoutMethodDetailsDto. For CARD: CardPayoutMethodDetailsDto. For WALLET: WalletPayoutMethodDetailsDto.

isDefault.description: Whether this payout method is the default for the merchant

details.description: Type-specific details based on payout method type. For BANK_ACCOUNT: use AccountPayoutMethodDetailsDto. For CARD: use CardPayoutMethodDetailsDto. For WALLET: use WalletPayoutMethodDetailsDto.

isDefault.description: Is default payout method for the merchant

startTime.description: Start time of the period (start of month)

endTime.description: End time of the period (end of month)

total.description: Total revenue in this period (in smallest currency unit)

refunded.description: Total amount refunded in this period (in smallest currency unit)

totalRevenue.description: Total revenue across all periods (in smallest currency unit)

totalRefunded.description: Total amount refunded across all periods (in smallest currency unit)

timeSeries.description: Time series data grouped by month

intervalCount.description: Number of intervals between each billing cycle

subscriptions.description: Number of active subscriptions using this price

lineItems.description: Number of line items using this price

unitAmount.description: Unit amount in smallest currency unit (e.g., cents for EGP)

neverUsed.description: Whether the price has never been used

count.description: Counts of subscriptions and line items

neverUsed.description: Whether the price has never been used

unitAmount.description: Unit amount in smallest currency unit (e.g., cents for EGP)

amountCaptured.description: Total gross amount captured (what customers paid) across all matching transactions. Includes: Product + VAT (if collected) + Platform Fees (if pass-through). In smallest currency unit (e.g., cents/piasters)

amountRefunded.description: Total amount refunded across all matching transactions (in smallest currency unit)

netAmount.description: Total net amount merchant receives after fees and refunds. Includes: Product + VAT (if collected) - Platform Fees (always deducted). Calculated as: SUM(bt.net) - refunds. In smallest currency unit (e.g., cents/piasters)

totals.description: Aggregate totals across all matching transactions
